message: Node started: Calculate the effective Rydberg energy (Ry*) of the exciton system. Use the given band gap (Eg) and the energy of the 1s exciton peak (E_exciton) to find the binding energy (E_b) for the n=1 state. Note that E_exciton = Eg - E_b. Ensure the binding energy is treated as a positive magnitude for the Rydberg constant.
